title: senecio pseudomairei
intro: Senecio pseudomairei, also known as the Dwarf Ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits in reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic, making it useful in wound care and skin conditions. Senecio pseudomairei can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate colds, fever, and other infections.
